💡 Headlights (GPIO)

Control the 3 GPIO switch ports (headlights/accessories).

💬 Send Text Command to Jarvis

Type a command and see what Jarvis would say — no voice or robot movement required. Uses the live Claude API, so ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set.
